name: Corn Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flours together.
2. Crumble the tofu into a blender.
3. Add boiling water and salt to the tofu in the blender (carefully) and blend until nearly smooth. Use only a few pulses.
4. Do not use an extremely small blender or one without a lid, as this can cause burns.
5. Add the blended mixture immediately to the flour mixture and mix well.
6. Spoon the batter into muffin tins or cast iron trays.
7. Bake at 400°F for about half an hour until golden brown. Preheat the oven first and place the greased tins in it before baking to achieve a wonderful crust.
Please note, I have to grease the tins because I avoid Teflon products around my birds. This recipe is not sweet; it pairs well with corn potato chowder, and the corn pieces are delicious!
